creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-09-24 06:25:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/soundconverter Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  SoundConverter is the sound conversion application for the GNOME
  environment. It reads anything the GStreamer library can read
  (Ogg Vorbis, AAC, MP3, FLAC, WAV, AVI, MPEG, MOV, M4A, AC3, DTS,
  ALAC, MPC, Shorten, APE, SID, etc...), and writes WAV, FLAC, MP3,
  and Ogg Vorbis files.
  
  WWW: http://soundconverter.berlios.de/
  
  PR:             ports/116470
  Submitted by:   Jona Joachim <jaj at hcl-club.lu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.902     +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/audio/soundconverter/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/soundconverter/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/audio/soundconverter/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +47 -0     ports/audio/soundconverter/pkg-plist (new)
